completed_tasks.name: Widen Domain image-update methods (UpdateAsync/UpsertProfileAsync) + CroppedPictureFile ViewModel property
Convert character/contact list-card images to 1:1 square boxes
Client-side crop pipeline (image-crop.js/css: EXIF/downscale, Cropper.js v2, DataTransfer)
Controller wiring: cropped-read endpoints, DM repoint, dual-file validation+persistence in Edit/EditProfile POSTs
Gap-closure: persist a crop submitted at Create time (new 3-arg AddAsync overload) + fixed a latent nav-null bug on Create

remaining_tasks.name: Repoint read-only avatar/thumbnail src to cropped-read endpoints (Characters/Contacts index, Quest Details/Manage/_QuestCard, QuestLog Details)
Wire crop modal + Cropper.js CDN + image-crop.js + hidden CroppedPictureFile input into all 10 upload views
Real-device verification (EXIF orientation, iOS Safari canvas-memory ceiling, touch-drag precision) — non-autonomous, opens with a blocking device-access checkpoint

blockers.description: Real-device verification access for Plan 46-07 is NOT YET CONFIRMED (same physical iPhone as Phase 43? Also Android? User previously answered 'Not yet confirmed' during discuss-phase).
blockers.workaround: Waves 1-3 (all code-complete work, plans 46-01/02/03/04/05/06/08) do not depend on this — only Plan 46-07's verification checkpoint is blocked.

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm real-device access (iPhone, optionally Android) before Plan 46-07 executes
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 46-07 is the phase's final wave — EXIF orientation, iOS Safari canvas-memory ceiling, and touch-drag precision can only be verified on a real device, not devtools emulation, per this project's own PITFALLS.md precedent.

decisions.decision: Inserted a new gap-closure plan (46-08) mid-execution rather than shipping Create-time crop loss as a known limitation or restricting the crop modal to Edit-only forms
decisions.rationale: The phase's own locked success criterion #1 explicitly says 'every image-upload field... create and edit' — Plan 03's executor found Create POST validates a submitted crop but has nowhere to persist it. User chose to fix it now (option 1 of 3 presented) rather than defer.

decisions.decision: 46-08's fix reuses the existing repository.UpdateWithProfileImageAsync (built in Phase 45) via a new additive 3-arg AddAsync overload, rather than adding a new domain-model field or repository method
decisions.rationale: Direct codebase investigation showed the generic AddAsync already creates the image row with OriginalImageData via AutoMapper; a second call to the existing Update-shaped method after Id is populated is sufficient. Confirmed by gsd-plan-checker before execution (1 blocker found and fixed: the plan initially specified a fabricated Moq test convention that doesn't exist in this codebase — corrected to the real InMemory-EF-Core test pattern before executing).

next_action: Run /gsd:execute-phase 46 to resume — it will auto-detect plans 46-01/02/03/05/08 as complete (SUMMARY.md exists) and resume with Wave 3 (46-04, 46-06), then Wave 4 (46-07, which will pause on its device-access checkpoint).
context_notes: Full test suite is green (235 unit + 372 integration = 607/607) after every merged wave. Working tree is clean, no worktrees left open, on branch milestone/v7-backlog-cleanup. This session hit and worked around three environment quirks (see Critical Anti-Patterns in .continue-here.md) — none blocked progress, all are advisory for the next session.
